about.intro1: is a ready-made self-service café module.
about.intro2: You buy the device, install it at your chosen location and earn from selling coffee directly to customers.

pains.title: Why traditional business
pains.subtitle: Na Kawkę — take control of your capital
pains.pain1Desc: Traditional franchise means a high entry barrier and having to give away part of your profit every month. Your money works for someone else's brand.
pains.pain1Impact: Effect: Thousands of złoty lost every year
pains.pain2Desc: Renting a large premises, high utility bills and expensive servicing create a constant financial burden regardless of daily turnover.
pains.pain3Desc: Renting a large premises, high utility bills and expensive servicing create a constant financial burden regardless of daily turnover.
pains.pain3Impact: Status: Constant control and no freedom
pains.pain4Desc: Imposed prices from franchise suppliers and hidden margins destroy your profitability. It is hard to have a clear plan for return on investment.
pains.pain4Impact: Result: Low margin and slow ROI

autonomy.title: Autonomy and
autonomy.subtitle: Business that works for you, not the other way around
autonomy.benefit1Desc: No salaries, no schedules, no HR issues.
autonomy.benefit2Desc: Cost per cup about 2 zł. Sale at about 8.5 zł.
autonomy.benefit3Desc: One point = 3000 zł profit. Three points = 9000 zł profit.

economics.title: Economics
economics.subtitle: Clear numbers that speak for themselves

economics.noFranchise2Desc: No royalty – 100% of profits for you

pricing.title: Equipment
pricing.subtitle: It's not an expense. It's an investment in a physical asset that earns from day one.
pricing.ctaSubtitle: Contact us for a full ROI plan and module delivery timelines.

howItWorks.ariaLabel: How the process from purchase to profit works
howItWorks.title: How does
howItWorks.subtitle: Simple, proven process from purchase to profit
howItWorks.step1Description: You choose a coffee module for 4500 or 6500 euros. Equipment warranty — 1 year.
howItWorks.step2Description: We provide a guide for finding a profitable location and full support at the start.
howItWorks.step3Description: You buy coffee and consumables from trusted suppliers with no markup.
howItWorks.step4Description: The module prepares and sells coffee automatically — without staff and constant involvement.
howItWorks.step5Description: You receive income from every sale and scale the model as you wish.
howItWorks.cta: Ready to start? The whole process from purchase to first profit takes less than 30 days.

seo.homeDescription: Ready coffee business without franchise and royalty. 24/7 autonomous café, 8–12 month ROI. Discover Standard and Premium packages.
seo.standardDescription: Standard Package — Jetinno JL22, 12 drinks, €4,500 net. Ideal start in autonomous coffee business. 8–12 month payback.
seo.premiumDescription: Premium Package — Jetinno JL300, up to 24 drinks including cold, €6,500 net. Maximum revenue, full autonomy.
